race.description: William Hill Each Way Extra Challenge Series Beginners Chase
race.comment: GAOTH CHUIL (12) rates well on form of a 4L second at Clonmel last time. That was a good run and gets on particularly well with this apprentice jockey. Leading contender. PRAY TELL (7) will find this a lot easier than a highly competitive Cork handicap he ran in last time. Won only previous course start and return here will suit. Big winning chance. SUPERSUNDAE (8) placed at Naas last time out. Represents leading trainer and should relish these conditions. Key player. DAMEAUSCOTTLESTOWN (11) is very interesting judging on chase debut at Leopardstown two starts ago when 1.75L second. Threat to all if building upon that here.
